name: jira-sheets-addon
description: Jira Sync for Google Sheets - Bi-directional sync between Jira and Google Sheets

scripts.push: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const d=new Date();const pad=n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');const offset=-d.getTimezoneOffset();const sign=offset>=0?'+':'-';const h=Math.floor(Math.abs(offset)/60);const m=Math.abs(offset)%60;const tz=sign+pad(h)+':'+pad(m);const stamp=d.getFullYear()+'-'+pad(d.getMonth()+1)+'-'+pad(d.getDate())+' '+pad(d.getHours())+':'+pad(d.getMinutes())+':'+pad(d.getSeconds())+' '+Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone;let c=fs.readFileSync('Code.js','utf8');c=c.replace(/const BUILD_DATE = \".*?\";/,'const BUILD_DATE = \"'+stamp+'\";');fs.writeFileSync('Code.js',c);" && clasp push
